revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>KrakatoaKatie|en>KrakatoaKatie]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{DMCA|Use American English|from|{{{date|}}}|All Wikipedia articles written in American English}} }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
